summary: Comprehensive UI testing completed for vastgoed ERP kiosk system UI improvements. All 10 features verified working correctly: Dashboard shows only 'expiring soon' warning (not expired), WhatsApp/Email modals with Versturen button, AddRentModal with Internet option, Kwitanties with Openstaand column and clean receipt preview, Bank/Kas with black amounts, Werknemers pay modal with Uitbetalen button, and Notificaties with red Verschonen button.

issues: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key 2026-03' - minor, doesn't affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI improvements verified working. Dashboard only shows 'verlopen binnen 30 dagen' warning. WhatsApp/Email/Pay actions use popup modals instead of browser confirm/alert. AddRentModal has 5 type buttons including Internet. Kwitanties has Openstaand column and clean receipt preview. Bank/Kas amounts are black. Notificaties has red Verschonen button.
